top3.sql:
WITH consumption_2012 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),

WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
)
